summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Settings page accordion functionality. All core accordion behaviors are working correctly - Account Information opens by default, only one section can be open at a time, clicking headers toggles sections appropriately, and form state is preserved when switching. Found one minor issue with chevron rotation detection.

ui_bugs.issue: Chevron rotation detection issue - chevron appears to rotate correctly visually but test selector may need adjustment

integration_issues.issue: User session expires during extended testing, requiring re-login
affected_selectors: Login page appears after extended testing

passed_tests: Account Information section is open by default
Security and Privacy sections are closed by default
Profile Picture section is always visible (not collapsible)
Only one accordion section can be open at a time
Clicking Security header opens Security and closes Account Information
Clicking Privacy header opens Privacy and closes Security
Clicking an already-open section header closes it (all sections can be closed)
Privacy toggles (Online Visibility, Notification Sounds, Read Receipts, Delivery Status) are functional
Form state is preserved when switching between sections
Email and nickname input fields work correctly inside accordion
Password fields in Security section are functional
Smooth animation transitions between accordion states
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Review chevron rotation CSS classes to ensure proper visual feedback. The functionality works correctly but test detection of rotation classes may need refinement.
